alert.title: AuthLoginFailureRate > 60%
alert.body: login success rate collapsed from 99% to 38%; users cannot sign in

signals.title: Config change: auth-svc env vars
signals.body: updated env variable JWT_ISSUER and rotated OAUTH_CLIENT_ID via config flag push

signals.title: auth-svc error
signals.body: invalid credential: token issuer mismatch, unauthorized 403 from identity provider

signals.title: auth-svc request volume
signals.body: request volume normal; only failure rate elevated

signals.title: Deploy auth-svc v3.2.0
signals.body: morning code deploy, ran clean for 2 hours before incident (likely unrelated)

ground_truth.root_cause: Config push changed JWT_ISSUER/OAUTH_CLIENT_ID env vars, causing token issuer mismatch and auth failures
acceptable_next_steps: Add validation on JWT_ISSUER config key
